operating_policy.green_use: Primary/client-facing source when facts appear directly on the source or are operator verified.
operating_policy.yellow_use: Discovery or review-only lead. Requires manual confirmation before client delivery.
operating_policy.red_use: Do not use red sources in client deliverables.

sources.name: Manual client and analyst intake
sources.publish_policy: Client-facing only after human review and source URL check.

sources.name: Universal Roofs profile manual observation
sources.publish_policy: Manual observation only. Use for directional reputation and positioning notes with source link.

sources.name: Alba Tech Roofing profile manual observation
sources.publish_policy: Manual observation only. Use for directional reputation and availability notes with source link.

sources.name: Available Roofing profile manual observation
sources.publish_policy: Manual observation only. Use for directional reputation and service-area positioning notes with source link.

sources.name: 2026 home improvement demand trend article
sources.publish_policy: Use as a market-trend source with attribution and concise summary only.

sources.name: 2026 home features cost trend article
sources.publish_policy: Use as a market-trend source with attribution and concise summary only.

sources.name: Canadian National Exhibition 2026 public event reference
sources.publish_policy: Use only for high-level public event timing and scale; verify vendor details before pitching.
